content.rendered:
Privacy Policy for How‑2.Codes

Last updated: March 2026

This Privacy Policy explains how Organicdevelopers.net, Limited (“we”, “our”, or “us”) collects, uses, and protects information when you visit or interact with our website https://how-2.codes/ (“the Site”). We are committed to maintaining a clean, transparent, and privacy‑respecting experience for all users.

🔍 Information We Collect

We collect information in the following ways:

1. Information You Provide

  • Contact form submissions (name, email, message content)
  • Newsletter sign‑ups (email address)
  • Comments or interactions on posts (if enabled)

2. Automatically Collected Data

When you visit the Site, standard technical data may be collected automatically, including:

  • IP address
  • Browser type and version
  • Device information
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring URLs

This information helps us improve site performance and user experience.

3. Cookies & Tracking Technologies

The Site may use cookies or similar technologies to:

  • Improve functionality
  • Remember user preferences
  • Analyze traffic and usage patterns

You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

🛠️ How We Use Your Information

We use collected information to:

  • Provide and maintain the Site
  • Improve content, performance, and user experience
  • Respond to inquiries or support requests
  • Send optional newsletters or updates (only if you subscribe)
  • Protect against spam, abuse, or security threats

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

🤝 Third‑Party Services

Our Site may use trusted third‑party tools or plugins, such as:

  • Analytics services (e.g., Google Analytics)
  • WordPress plugins for performance, security, or forms
  • Advertising or affiliate networks (if enabled)

These third parties may collect data according to their own privacy policies. We encourage you to review their policies for more details.

🔐 Data Protection & Security

We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, loss, or misuse. However, no online system is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute protection.

🌍 International Data Transfers

If you access the Site from outside our operating region, your information may be processed in countries with different data protection laws. By using the Site, you consent to such transfers.

👦 Children’s Privacy

Our Site is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided information, please contact us so we can remove it.

✉️ Contact Information

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to request data removal or correction, contact us at:

Organicdevelopers.net, Limited Email: 7webgallery@gmail.com

🔄 Updates to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the Site means you accept the updated policy.
